global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with bold text and abstract shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple payment service.

elements.label: Orange abstract background
elements.description: A vibrant orange background with abstract shapes creating a dynamic visual effect.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: Various overlapping geometric shapes in lighter shades of orange, adding depth to the background.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A central rectangular area that serves as the main focus for text and visuals.

elements.label: Service description
elements.description: Text in a clean, modern font stating 'Secure & simple' with a secondary line below it.

elements.label: Peace of mind
elements.description: A continuation of the service description, emphasizing the reliability of the service.

elements.label: Additional element
elements.description: An abstract shape that adds visual interest but does not convey specific information.

elements.label: Additional element
elements.description: Another abstract shape that complements the overall design without specific meaning.

elements.label: Small decorative shape
elements.description: A small circular shape positioned towards the top, enhancing the design's complexity.

elements.label: Small abstract element
elements.description: A small rectangular shape located at the bottom, contributing to the overall aesthetic.

elements.label: Additional abstract shape
elements.description: A larger rectangular shape that adds to the layered effect of the design.

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: Bold text at the top reading 'NovaPay', prominently displayed in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Service tagline
elements.description: Text that conveys the service's simplicity and security, presented in a clear, readable font.
elements.text_content: Secure & simple Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom stating 'Claim reward', designed to attract user interaction.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by the main content area in the center, with the CTA at the bottom.
